summary: Verified P0/P1 bug fixes for in-Mira service request flow. Service cards and experience cards now open modal within Mira OS instead of linking externally. 'Let Concierge Handle It' tile appears alongside service cards. All form fields present in modal. Backend ticket creation working.

p0_service_request_modal.grooming_card_opens_modal: PASS - Clicking Grooming service card opens modal (not external link)
p0_service_request_modal.experience_card_opens_modal: PASS - Clicking Party Planning Wizard experience card opens modal
p0_service_request_modal.concierge_card_opens_modal: PASS - Clicking 'Let Concierge Handle It' tile opens modal
p0_service_request_modal.modal_form_fields: PASS - Modal contains: Additional Details textarea, Preferred Date picker, Urgency dropdown, Cancel/Submit buttons

p1_concierge_tile.tile_visible: PASS - 'Let Concierge Handle It' tile appears alongside Grooming card
p1_concierge_tile.tile_styling: PASS - Purple heart icon (💜), correct description 'We'll take care of everything for you'

backend_api.soul_score_increment: PASS - Soul score incremented on service request
backend_api.intent_secondary_validation: PASS - API correctly requires list for intent_secondary

verified_features.service_cards_open_modal: Service cards (Grooming, Walks, Training, etc.) now open in-Mira modal instead of external wizard URL
verified_features.experience_cards_open_modal: Experience cards (Party Planning Wizard, Pawcation, etc.) now open in-Mira modal
verified_features.concierge_tile: 'Let Concierge Handle It' tile displayed alongside service options with proper styling
verified_features.modal_form_complete: Modal includes: Additional Details textarea, Preferred Date picker, Urgency dropdown (Flexible/Normal/Soon/Urgent), Cancel and Submit Request buttons
verified_features.ticket_creation: Submit Request creates service desk ticket and shows confirmation with ticket ID
verified_features.soul_score_update: Service requests increment pet's soul score by 1.5 points

bugs_fixed.bug: intent_secondary should be array not string
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'SERVICE' to ['SERVICE'] for proper API validation

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/MiraDemoPage.jsx - Fixed intent_secondary to be array instead of string (line 2099)
seed_data_creation: Test tickets created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: In-Mira service request flow verified working. Service/Experience cards open modal instead of external links. 'Let Concierge Handle It' tile appears with service options. Modal form fields all present. Backend ticket creation API working. Fixed minor bug where intent_secondary was string instead of array.
